“Ah here you are Jane, the girls have all been dying to see you again. Isn’t that nice? Before we got together a lot of them were wishing they would never have to see you again, but now that you’ve finally dropped the façade and revealed your true self to them, they all love you. They’ve all been pestering me about what we got up to over the weekend, but being the good girlfriend that I am I didn’t want to talk about you behind your back, so I’ve saved all our juicy stories for now.” Valeria gushed much to Jake’s horror as he couldn’t help but squirm in his seat while the whole table had a good chuckle at his expense. He couldn’t believe that she had really just called him by his sissy name right in the middle of this busy cafeteria where everyone could technically overhear. Sure the place was loud and everyone was wrapped up in their own conversations, but still the fear remained. He also couldn’t believe that Valeria really wanted to discuss what they had done over the weekend right here and now which really meant discussing Chelsea’s party as it was the only noteworthy thing that had happened since he had served as their post match present.

Jake guessed that he appreciated the sentiment of not talking about him behind his back but right here and now he really wished that Valeria would have just told her friends about their weekend by now. He didn’t really want all her friends to know about what had happened at that party, but Valeria clearly wasn’t about to hold secrets anymore and it wasn’t like he had done anything they didn’t know about already.
